title: Ceradan® Diaper Cream (50g) (Protect & Prevent Diaper Rash| With Zinc Oxide, Octenidine & 3:1:1 Ceramide)
detail_text: Ceradan® Diaper Cream provides triple protective actions that help to protect and prevent diaper rash. Uniquely formulated with three active ingredients, ceramide-dominant essential skin lipids to rebuild the skin's protective barrier, zinc oxide to seals out wetness and octenidine to control yeast growth in the diaper. Suitable for newborn onwards. Ceramide-dominant ratio to optimally rebuild the protective skin barrier Zinc Oxide to seal out wetness and protect skin against maceration Octenidine is an effective agent to control yeast growth How To Use: 1) With every diaper change, clean and dry diaper area. 2) Apply liberally and evenly on skin. AT LEAST 1 YEAR OF EXPIRY

title: Mamave - Bubba's Barrier Cream for Baby Diaper Rash
detail_text: Baby Rash Cream - Zinc oxide and castor oil based to help soothe nappy rash 100mL Award-Winning Skincare for Mums and Babies by Vogue Australia & One Fine Baby (Vegan-friendly, Cruelty-free, Paraben-free, No Artificial Colours & Fragrance, No Peanut Oil, Mineral Oil, SLES/SLS-free) This cream is blended with delightful Calendula Extract, Zinc Oxide, and Castor Oil to create an effective moisture barrier on your baby's bottom and soother any stubbon nappy and dribble rashes. How to use: Apply a thick layer to your baby's bum (or other rash affected areas) Creates a barrier between their wet nappy and delicate skin Can help to limit redness and rash caused by constant rubbing You can also use on small cuts and abrasions on your baby's skin How To Use Apply to your baby’s bottom at nappy change time, creating a thick layer on the skin and any nappy rash-affected areas. title: Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment Advanced Therapy 396g (14oz) | 24-Hour Moisture Skin Protectant | #1 Pediatrician Recommended Gentle For Sensitive Dry Cracked Irritated Skin Diaper Rash
detail_text: Short Description / Product Highlights #1 PEDIATRICIAN RECOMMENDED BRAND: Highly trusted by generations of parents and recommended by pediatricians worldwide. Clinically proven to restore smooth, healthy baby skin. 24-HOUR LONG-LASTING RELIEF: Uniquely formulated to provide intense, continuous moisture for twenty-four hours. Creates a protective barrier that lets the skin breathe while locking in hydration. ️ GENTLE FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: Hypoallergenic and free from fragrances, preservatives, dyes, and parabens. Exceptionally safe for baby's highly sensitive skin and delicate skin barriers. ADVANCED THERAPY FOR MULTIPLE SKIN ISSUES: Specially designed to soothe dry, cracked, chafed, or irritated skin. Provides instant comfort and relief from diaper rash, drool rash, and dry patches. OFFICIAL SINGAPORE DISTRIBUTION: Authentic product distributed directly from an authorized retailer. Safe, reliable, and guaranteed quality for Singapore families. Detailed Product Description (Rich Content) Trusted by Generations: Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment Advanced Therapy The Daily Challenge: Baby's skin is highly delicate and prone to diaper rash, drool irritation, chafing, and dry patches that cause discomfort. The Trusted Solution: Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment is a multi-purpose skin protectant that helps heal and soothe irritated skin. The Breathable Shield: Unlike regular petroleum jelly, it creates a semi-occlusive barrier that allows oxygen to flow through, helping the skin recover naturally and quickly. Why You'll Love Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment: Clinically Proven Healing Power: Advanced Therapy: Formulated with active skin protectants like Petrolatum alongside nourishing Panthenol and Glycerin to moisturize, protect, and enhance healing. Visible Results: Noticeably improves baby's dry, cracked, or irritated skin in just one use. Multi-Purpose Skin Savior: Diaper Rash Relief: Effectively prevents diaper rash when applied at every diaper change. Drool Rash Protection: Soothes and protects the delicate skin around baby's mouth and cheeks from wetness and irritation caused by drooling or teething. Minor Scrapes and Burns: Safeguards minor cuts, scratches, and dry skin from external irritants. Clean and Safe Care: Fragrance-Free and Preservative-Free: Formulated without common irritants, ensuring it is gentle enough for newborns. Hypoallergenic Formula: Minimizes the risk of allergic reactions on reactive, eczema-prone skin. How to Use Cleanse: Wash the affected skin area gently and pat dry before application. Apply: Smooth a generous layer of Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment onto the dry or irritated area. Repeat: Apply as frequently as needed, especially at every diaper change, to protect against wetness and prevent diaper rash. Protect: Use on baby's cheeks and chin to prevent drool rash during teething periods. Specifications & Product Details Brand: Aquaphor Baby Product Name: Healing Ointment Advanced Therapy Net Weight: 396 g / 14 OZ. Product Form: Multi-purpose skin protectant ointment Key Ingredients: Petrolatum, Panthenol, Glycerin, Bisabolol Recommended Skin Types: Sensitive, dry, cracked, chafed, or irritated baby skin Key Benefits: Twenty-four hour moisture, diaper rash prevention, drool rash soothing, skin barrier protection Safety Standards: Hypoallergenic, Fragrance-free, Preservative-free, Pediatrician Recommended Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) Q: Is this product safe for newborns? A: Yes. Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment is pediatrician-recommended, hypoallergenic, and free from fragrances and preservatives, making it completely safe for newborns from day one. Q: How does this differ from regular petroleum jelly? A: Unlike pure petroleum jelly, Aquaphor is enriched with Panthenol, Glycerin, and Bisabolol. This unique combination allows oxygen to reach the skin while actively moisturizing and soothing irritation, rather than just blocking moisture out. Q: Can adults use this product as well? A: Absolutely. It is highly effective for adults dealing with extremely dry hands, cracked heels, chapped lips, minor burns, and post-treatment skin recovery.

Trusted by Generations: Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment Advanced Therapy

  • The Daily Challenge: Baby's skin is highly delicate and prone to diaper rash, drool irritation, chafing, and dry patches that cause discomfort.
  • The Trusted Solution: Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment is a multi-purpose skin protectant that helps heal and soothe irritated skin.
  • The Breathable Shield: Unlike regular petroleum jelly, it creates a semi-occlusive barrier that allows oxygen to flow through, helping the skin recover naturally and quickly.

Why You'll Love Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment:

  • Clinically Proven Healing Power:
    • Advanced Therapy: Formulated with active skin protectants like Petrolatum alongside nourishing Panthenol and Glycerin to moisturize, protect, and enhance healing.
    • Visible Results: Noticeably improves baby's dry, cracked, or irritated skin in just one use.
  • Multi-Purpose Skin Savior:
    • Diaper Rash Relief: Effectively prevents diaper rash when applied at every diaper change.
    • Drool Rash Protection: Soothes and protects the delicate skin around baby's mouth and cheeks from wetness and irritation caused by drooling or teething.
    • Minor Scrapes and Burns: Safeguards minor cuts, scratches, and dry skin from external irritants.
  • Clean and Safe Care:
    • Fragrance-Free and Preservative-Free: Formulated without common irritants, ensuring it is gentle enough for newborns.
    • Hypoallergenic Formula: Minimizes the risk of allergic reactions on reactive, eczema-prone skin.

How to Use

  • Cleanse: Wash the affected skin area gently and pat dry before application.
  • Apply: Smooth a generous layer of Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment onto the dry or irritated area.
  • Repeat: Apply as frequently as needed, especially at every diaper change, to protect against wetness and prevent diaper rash.
  • Protect: Use on baby's cheeks and chin to prevent drool rash during teething periods.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

  • Q: Is this product safe for newborns?
    • A: Yes. Aquaphor Baby Healing Ointment is pediatrician-recommended, hypoallergenic, and free from fragrances and preservatives, making it completely safe for newborns from day one.
  • Q: How does this differ from regular petroleum jelly?
    • A: Unlike pure petroleum jelly, Aquaphor is enriched with Panthenol, Glycerin, and Bisabolol. This unique combination allows oxygen to reach the skin while actively moisturizing and soothing irritation, rather than just blocking moisture out.
  • Q: Can adults use this product as well?
    • A: Absolutely. It is highly effective for adults dealing with extremely dry hands, cracked heels, chapped lips, minor burns, and post-treatment skin recovery.
